S.FORM: == satangahan : == tai' (tempil) u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :Á≥ěšĺŅ,ŚĪé nu Amilika :Feces nu Zipun :Á≥ě u canan ku tai' (tempil)(tai' (tempil)śėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == tai Ē~ ° (t…ômpir~…ĺ) u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :**,* nu amir~…ĺika :f…ô ¶…ôs nu zipun :* u ¶anan ku tai Ē~ ° (t…ômpir~…ĺ)(tai Ē~ ° (t…ômpir~…ĺ)***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == tai' (tempil) u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :Á≥ěšĺŅ,ŚĪé nu Amilika :Feces nu Zipun :Á≥ě u canan ku tai' (tempil)(tai' (tempil)śėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == tai Ē~ ° (t…ômpir~…ĺ) u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :**,* nu amir~…ĺika :f…ô ¶…ôs nu zipun :* u ¶anan ku tai Ē~ ° (t…ômpir~…ĺ)(tai Ē~ ° (t…ômpir~…ĺ)***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
